---
title: Personal Projects
---

Project gallery for personal projects related to statistics and data visualization!

### Bay-Tabase: 50 Years of San Francisco Bay Water Quality
<!--The three hashtags above mean header size 3 (smaller than 1 and 2) -->
<iframe
height="400"
width="100%"
style="border: 3px solid #DA70D6; border-radius: 10px"
src=https://eevaz1-finley-dibert0burgwin.shinyapps.io/project/></iframe>
<figcaption style="color:#DA70D6"> This Shiny Application was created to display the San Francisco Bay’s water quality data from the United States Geological Survey long-term ecological time series. Click this <a href="https://eevaz1-finley-dibert0burgwin.shinyapps.io/project/" target="_blank">link</a> to view the app in an external tab.
</figcaption>
